name: kirsch-plate
citation: Kirsch, G. (1898). Die Theorie der Elastizität und die Bedürfnisse der Festigkeitslehre. Zeitschrift des Vereines Deutscher Ingenieure 42:797–807. Infinite plate with circular hole of radius a under remote uniaxial tension sigma_inf: in polar form, sigma_theta(r=a, theta=pi/2) = 3 sigma_inf (SCF = 3), independent of E, nu, and a. Stress field (Timoshenko & Goodier, Theory of Elasticity, Art. 35): sigma_r = (sigma/2)(1-a^2/r^2) + (sigma/2)(1-4a^2/r^2+3a^4/r^4)cos2theta; sigma_theta = (sigma/2)(1+a^2/r^2) - (sigma/2)(1+3a^4/r^4)cos2theta; tau_rtheta = -(sigma/2)(1+2a^2/r^2-3a^4/r^4)sin2theta. Verification applies this traction field on a finite annular sector so the finite-domain error is zero in the continuum limit.
